title: Marketplace Manager - Titan Eyeplus - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Titan Eyeplus - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Titan Eyeplus family as a Marketplace Manager in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Titan Eyeplus:
Titan Eyeplus is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Eyeplus!
